title: Water survey data products and services - Canada.ca
content:
## Water survey data products and services
Visit the Water Survey of Canada Real-Time Data section to obtain the most recent hydrometric data collected at over 1600 stations across Canada.

## Historical Data & Station Information
HYDAT is the archival database that contains all water information collected through the National Hydrometric Program. These data include: daily and monthly mean flow, water level and sediment concentration for over 2500 active and 5500 discontinued hydrometric monitoring station across Canada.
- Archived Hydrometric Data
- Water Level and Streamflow Statistics
- Reference Hydrometric Basin Network (RHBN)
- Station Number Index
- Reference Index Online

## Hydrological Modelling Tools
- GreenKenue TM - advanced data preparation, visualization and analysis tool for hydrological models.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
